channel.title: Abouts on kernw0lf blog
channel.description: Recent content in Abouts on kernw0lf blog

item.title: About
item.author: info.kernw0lf@proton.me (KernW0lf)
item.description: 🔒🌐 Cybersecurity Enthusiast | 💻 Mobile App Developer | 🚀 Tech Explorer Dedicated and versatile software engineer with a passion for cybersecurity and mobile application development. Proficient in fuzzing vulnerability research, with hands-on experience uncovering and mitigating security vulnerabilities across various platforms. Skilled in Android app development, from concept to deployment, with a focus on creating secure and user-friendly applications. Possessing a strong foundation in software engineering principles, including debugging, testing, and code optimization.
